query:
SELECT 'nightlyAgendaEmails' as automation, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(createdAt) as last_at FROM nightlyAgendaEmails GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'dailyRecapRequests', status, COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM dailyRecapRequests GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'weekly_digests', status, COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM weekly_digests GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalEvents', 'rows', COUNT(*), MAX(updatedAt) FROM icalEvents
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalFeeds', 'rows', COUNT(*), MAX(lastFetchedAt) FROM icalFeeds
ORDER BY automation, status;
